insights: Top holding concentration is elevated; consider trimming the largest position.
The largest sector is Consumer Defensive at 51.86% of the portfolio.
Portfolio beta is below market, indicating lower sensitivity to broad market moves.
Holdings exhibit low correlation, which supports diversification.
Estimated daily loss at 95% confidence is about 1.72%.
Expected shortfall in the worst tail is about 2.26%.
Maximum drawdown over the observed period is about 28.68%.
The largest contribution to portfolio risk currently comes from RELIANCE.NS at about 51.1%.
